case_title: MATTHEW WILLIAMS VS. TASHA GOLD ET AL

CROSS--DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMLY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT ON THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT GOLD, TASHA PALAZZO, BRIAN RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, MATTHEW $1,720.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,805.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
